title: The Names of 'Uthman' s Provincial Governors during This Year
description: during This Year According to Muhammad b. 'Umar (a1-Wagidi)--'Abd al-Rahman b. Abi al-Zinad: When 'Uthman was killed, his provincial governors were as follows: i. in Mecca, 'Abdallah b. al-Hadrami; 2. in al-TA'if, al-QAsim b. Rabi'ah al-Thaqafi; 3. in $an 'a', Ya'la b. Munyah; 4. in al-Janad, 'Abdallah b. Abi Rabi'ah•457 5. in Bagrah, 'Abdallah b. 'Amir b. Kurayz-he had left his post, but 'Uthman had appointed no one to replace him; 6. in Kufah, Said b. al-'A4-he had been driven out and was not permitted to reenter the city; 7. in Egypt, 'Abdallah b.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 15
